Name: grate Database Migrations
Description:
Database migrations using [grate](https://github.com/grate-devs/grate).
With this template you can either include grate with your package or use the `Download grate?` feature to download it at deploy time.  If you're downloading, you can choose the version by specifying it in the `Version of grate`.

NOTE: 
 - AWS EC2 IAM Role authentication requires the AWS CLI be installed.
 - To run on Linux, the machine must have both PowerShell Core and .NET Core 3.1 installed.

Parameters.Name: gratePackage
Parameters.Label: grate Package
Parameters.HelpText: The package containing the scripts for grate to deploy.

Parameters.Name: grateServerName
Parameters.Label: Database Server Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name or IP address of the server being deployed to.

Parameters.Name: grateServerPort
Parameters.Label: Database Server Port
Parameters.HelpText: Port number for the database server.  Uses default server port if left blank.

Parameters.Name: grateAuthenticationMethod
Parameters.Label: Authentication Method
Parameters.HelpText: Method used to authenticate to the database server.

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
awsiam|AWS EC2 IAM Role
azuremanagedidentity|Azure Managed Identity
gcpserviceaccount|GCP Service Account
usernamepassword|Username\Password
windowsauthentication|Windows Authentication

Parameters.Name: grateDatabaseName
Parameters.Label: Database Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the database to deploy to.

Parameters.Name: grateSsl
Parameters.Label: Force SSL
Parameters.HelpText: Check this box for force connection string to use SSL.  Only applicable to MariaDB, MySQL, SQL Server, and PostgreSQL database types.

Parameters.Name: grateVersion
Parameters.Label: Database Version
Parameters.HelpText: Version number of your database migration.  Default value is the version of the grate package.

Parameters.Name: grateUsername
Parameters.Label: Database Username
Parameters.HelpText: Username of the account with sufficient permissions to execute scripts.  (Leave blank for Integrated Authentication.)

Parameters.Name: grateUserPassword
Parameters.Label: Database User Password
Parameters.HelpText: Password for the Database Username account.

Parameters.Name: grateDatabaseServerType
Parameters.Label: Database Server Type
Parameters.HelpText: The database technology being deployed to.

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
mariadb|MariaDB
mysql|MySQL
oracle|Oracle
postgresql|PostgreSQL
sqlserver|SQL Server

Parameters.Name: grateWithTransaction
Parameters.Label: Use Transaction?
Parameters.HelpText: Check this box if you want all scripts to be run within the same transaction.

Parameters.Name: grateDryRun
Parameters.Label: Dry Run?
Parameters.HelpText: Check this box if you want to perform a dry run.  Results are recorded and attached as deployment artifacts if you check Record Output.

Parameters.Name: grateRecordOutput
Parameters.Label: Record Output?
Parameters.HelpText: Check this box to record the output of the run.  Useful for gathering what would be changed for approval purposes.

Parameters.Name: grateCommandTimeout
Parameters.Label: Command Timeout
Parameters.HelpText: Customizable command timeout (in seconds). Default is 60

Parameters.Name: grateBaseline
Parameters.Label: Use Baseline
Parameters.HelpText: Check this box if you want grate to mark the scripts as run, but not to actually run anything against the database. [More information about this option can be found here](https://erikbra.github.io/grate/configuration-options/)

Parameters.Name: grateSqlScriptFolder
Parameters.Label: SQL Script folder
Parameters.HelpText: Script location to use for grate (if not in the root of the package)

Parameters.Name: grateLogVerbosity
Parameters.Label: Log Level
Parameters.HelpText: Configure log level when running Grate.

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
critical|Critical
debug|Debug
error|Error
information|Information
none|None
trace|Trace
warning|Warning

Parameters.Name: grateDownloadNuget
Parameters.Label: Download grate?
Parameters.HelpText: Check this box if you want the template to download RoundhousE and use the downloaded version for deployment.  Requires .NET Core be installed on the machine executing the deployment.

Parameters.Name: grateNugetVersion
Parameters.Label: Version of grate
Parameters.HelpText: Version of grate to download (used with Download grate option), leave blank for latest.

Parameters.Name: grateEnvironment
Parameters.Label: Grate environment
Parameters.HelpText: The environment specific scripts that grate will execute

Parameters.Name: grateSchema
Parameters.Label: Grate schema for migration tables
Parameters.HelpText: Useful if migrating from RoundhousE.
